original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求背景暗色调（可以不是黑色）的女性高级礼盒面板或者放点黑白的玫瑰，主文案居中，主文案：平安顺遂 副文案：白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry scene, Dark Premium Gift Vibe. The main subject is [Subject Lock]: A bracelet composed of highly transparent, spherical beads (clear quartz), arranged in a continuous circular loop. The beads act as lenses, refracting light with strong specular highlights and internal reflections. The bracelet rests on a deep charcoal or slate-grey velvet gift box panel. 
[Props]: Artistic monochromatic black and white roses are placed softly in the background, adding an elegant, romantic texture without color distraction.
[Background]: Dark, textured, premium matte finish. 
[Lighting]: Dramatic focused spotlighting (Rim Light) to enhance the crystal clarity and create sharp sparkles on the bead surfaces.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Center-Aligned Vertical Layout (Centered Composition).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: "平安顺遂". Position: [Top Center or Floating above product]. Style: [Elegant Serif / Songti, Gold Foil Texture, Glowing].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: "白水晶". Position: [Directly below Main Title]. Style: [Minimalist Sans-serif, Silver or White, small letter spacing].
3. **Marketing Banner/Badge**: Content: "甄选好礼" (Selected Gift - Brainstormed). Style: [Small semi-transparent capsule at the bottom center].
layout_logic: 考虑到用户要求'主文案居中'且背景为暗色调，建议采用'上文下图'的经典居中构图。1. 既然背景较暗，文字必须使用金属色（金/银）或亮白色来确保可读性。2. 手串作为圆形物体，非常适合居中放置在画面下半部分，文字悬浮在圆环上方，形成视觉上的稳定感（'天圆地方'的构图美学）。3. 黑白玫瑰作为背景纹理不要过于抢眼，建议适当虚化，确保白水晶的'透亮'是视觉的第一焦点。
